attachment_accounting.summary: Attachment-derived bookkeeping requires explicit provenance and extraction confidence handling.

invoice_credit_note.title: Invoice Credit Note

supplier_invoice_payment.summary: Payment registration should prefer the action endpoint and keep payload narrow.
supplier_invoice_payment.title: Supplier Invoice Payment

travel_expense_payload.summary: Base travel expense creation and row creation have schema quirks and should use dedicated row commands.
travel_expense_payload.title: Travel Expense Payload
